_note: Canonical list of sound cues every personality is expected to provide. Each personality has its own folder (assets/sounds/<slug>/) with files for these cues. Only the ACTIVE personality's sounds fire. Cues are PRE-LOADED and fire instantly from the frontend — never generated live. A personality may omit a cue (it just won't fire) or add extras.

entrance.description: Plays when someone enters / on the manual 'entrance theme' button. The personality's signature arrival music.

laugh_track.description: Manual button. Sitcom-style laughter for a comedic beat.

sting.description: Short dramatic punctuation under/after a big line (quest-complete chime, hype air horn, tender reassurance swell).

theme_loop.description: Low background music bed for this personality. The AudioManager DUCKS this under narration.

rules: Only the active personality's sounds fire.
Missing cue files simply don't play.
Custom personalities reuse a shared/neutral cue set (no shipped audio) — build-time decision.
